==Biography==
'''cowTard''' is a high elo player who dwelled in a number of small cities in Sweden. At the age of two, he was hooked on Nintendo gaming. Later on, he played WarCraft III, DOTA, and StarCraft II (competitively under the name of '''cowmarine''').

One of cowTard's DOTA friends introduced him to League of Legends during the beta, and he initially was confused by the interface and looks of the game. As soon as the game was released, he returned to the game and was pleased with how it developed. Due to his more support-oriented playstyle in the mid lane, he climbed the ranks slowly but steadily.

In early March 2011, '''cowTard''' met his first competitive teammates through Normal games. The team, Rest in Piecez, initially played the game casually, and loads of role swaps occurred. When the time came for tournaments, they organized themselves and made solid appearances. [[Team MegashocK]] picked up the roster, but the team left for [[Team WinFakt]] four months later. As WinFakt, the roster stood up against the likes of [[Moscow Five]] and [[Fnatic]], but loss of motivation from players led to separation.

The Swede player, then a free agent, was contacted by the [[Copenhagen Wolves]] circa PanDan ([[GodBro]], [[Svenskeren]], [[Bjergsen]], [[TheTess]], and [[Deficio]]). Due to Bjergsen's age situation, the Wolves needed a temporary replacement. cowTard successfully passed the tryouts, and he allowed the team to qualify to the Season 3 LCS Spring Split. With Bjergsen's return (Feb 21, 2013), cowTard returned to substitute duties, until he joined [[PrideFC]], the roster that went on to be the new [[Copenhagen Wolves]] and qualify for the 2014 LCS Spring Split.

== Trivia ==
* Outside of competitive League of Legends, his favorite champion is {{ci|Mordekaiser}}.
:* Played a lot of [[Mordekaiser]] when elo climbing, and {{ci|Zilean}} when he leveled his account to 30.
* His main account was banned for 14 days in March 2013 for Elo boosting along with other pro players such as [[YellOwStaR]], [[Jimbz]], [[NeeGodbro]], [[Nono]], and [[ViRtU4l]].<ref>[http://forums.euw.leagueoflegends.com/board/showthread.php?p=10857726 LCS Competition Rulings: EU Elo-Boosters] ''forums.euw.leagueoflegends.com''</ref>
* Used to play chess competitively. However, he let go of competitive chess as he grew up, as chess games became lengthier.
* His appreciation of the show Game of Thrones led him to read the books (A Song of Ice and Fire) to cope with the wait between the TV show's seasons.
* Princess Mononoke is one of the best anime movies he has ever seen.
* Considers a preparation of hasselbackspotatis, beef filet and layered doubh to be his favorite meal. Also enjoys drinking 7up.
